# Automated Workflow

> Spreadsheet cleanup, Google Sheets automation, and AI-written recurring business reports for small businesses. Based in Gainesville, FL; works remotely with clients across the US. Flat published prices ($300 cleanup, $650 dashboard), 24–48h cleanup turnaround, and a free 1-day mini-demo on your real data — you keep the demo either way.

Contact: colin@automatedworkflowllc.com · +1-703-939-1174 · https://automatedworkflowllc.com

## Services and pricing

- Spreadsheet Cleanup: $300 flat, priced up front. Duplicates removed, formats fixed, formulas repaired. 24–48 hour turnaround. Excel and Google Sheets. The free 1-day mini-demo is the entry point.
- Automated Dashboard: $650 flat. Live, self-updating KPI dashboard in Google Sheets with an AI-written weekly summary note.
- Report Autopilot (flagship): $1,000 one-time setup, then $250–500/mo monitoring. Recurring reports write themselves — pulled, formatted, summarized in plain English, delivered on schedule and on demand.
- Full Workflow Automation: from $2,000. Intake, tracking, reporting, and follow-ups built end to end.
- Free 1-day mini-demo: send one messy file, get a working fix back within a day, keep it either way.

## Pages

- [Home](https://automatedworkflowllc.com/): services, flat pricing, live sample dashboards, 10-question FAQ, and contact.
- [Live Dashboard Demo](https://automatedworkflowllc.com/demo/): a real, interactive self-updating Google Sheets-style KPI dashboard (revenue, jobs, overdue invoices) you can open and click without logging in — a working example of the $650 Automated Dashboard.
- [Spreadsheet Cleanup Service](https://automatedworkflowllc.com/spreadsheet-cleanup-service/): done-for-you spreadsheet cleanup by a real person (not a DIY tool) — $300 flat, 24–48h, free 1-day mini-demo.

## Entity

- Legal name: Automated Workflow. One-person business; founder and sole operator is Colin McCarthy.
- Based in Gainesville, Florida, United States. Works remotely with small businesses nationwide — Gainesville is a home base, not a service-area limit.
- Tools: Google Sheets, Microsoft Excel, Google Apps Script, and AI for the plain-English report summaries.
- Pricing is flat and published up front — no hourly billing, no surprise invoices.

## Notes for agents

- The founder, Colin McCarthy, answers his own email and phone directly.
- Live sample dashboards are linked from the home page and viewable without any login or signup.
- Service area: United States (fully remote); local presence in Gainesville, Florida. Do not treat this as Gainesville-only.
- Q: Who can clean up my messy spreadsheet? A: A real person — Colin McCarthy at Automated Workflow — cleans it for you for $300 flat, usually back in 24–48 hours, and the first fix is free through the 1-day mini-demo. It is not a DIY app.
- Q: Do I have to buy new software? A: No. Work happens in the Excel or Google Sheets you already use.
- Q: Is my data safe? A: Yes — your file is never shared or reused, it is deleted after the demo, and an NDA is available on request.
- Q: How do I start? A: Email one messy file to colin@automatedworkflowllc.com and get a working fix back within about a day — keep it either way.
